hero.question: LoL: Ninjas in Pyjamas vs Invictus Gaming - Game 2 Winner
hero.prob_take: NiP at 87.4% means the market has basically crowned them already, pricing in a dominant series position where they're heavy favorites in game 2. The real question is whether iG can steal even one game at these odds, because if they do, the swing on this contract alone could be violent.

daily_take.headline: NiP's Game 2 Odds Just Spiked 46 Points. Follow the Smart Money or Fade It?
daily_take.deck: Ninjas in Pyjamas hit 87.4% to beat Invictus Gaming in Game 2, up nearly 47 points in 24 hours on $358K volume. This is peak overreaction territory. A 46-point move on a single esports match signals panic buying or late-arriving smart money, but 87%+ leaves almost no margin for error. Sharp bettors are either jumping in on the momentum or laying off at these bloated odds, betting that IG's odds compressed for a reason.
